candidates.title: AcademicMania Website Banner Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · XD — Photoshop · Illustrator · XD
candidates.brief: Project Title: Website Hero Banner Design for AcademicMania.com Project Description: We are looking for a creative and experienced graphic designer to design a professional, modern, and high-converting homepage banner (hero section) for our academic services website, AcademicMania.com. About Our Business AcademicMania.com provides: Academic Writing Services Dissertation Writing Services Case Study Writing Translation Services Research Project Assistance ACCA BSc Applied Accounting Project Support London School of Business MSc Project Assistance Design Requirements Premium and professional design Modern educational and academic theme Trustworthy and credible appearance Suitable for desktop and mobile responsiveness High-quality graphics and typography Blue, white, and gold color scheme preferred Banner Content Main Heading: "Expert Academic Writing & Research Support" Services to Highligh

candidates.title: Cover Artist for Hip-Hop Single - "Vision Board" (Trial Project, Long-Term Potential)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Cover Art Designer — Hip-Hop Single (Paid Trial → Ongoing Work) Job Title (for the Upwork listing) Cover Artist for Hip-Hop Single — "Vision Board" (Trial Project, Long-Term Potential) About the project I'm 28, an independent hip-hop artist (stage name Bastian) with a catalog of 30+ tracks now rolling out as singles through a global distributor. I'm looking for a designer to create the cover art for my upcoming single "Vision Board," and — if it's a strong fit — to become my go-to cover artist for every release going forward. To be upfront: this is a paid trial. I'm hiring a few designers for this first cover so I can find the one person I want to build a long-term relationship with. If we click, you become my dedicated cover artist — regular, recurring, paid work on a predictable release schedule. I'd much rather find one great collaborator than re-hire from scratch

candidates.title: Instagram Reels Editor - Business Building (2 Founders, 4 Reels/Week)
candidates.brief: Job Description: I'm looking for a skilled video editor who specializes in Instagram Reels to produce content for two founders on an ongoing basis. Volume & Commitment - 2 Reels per week per founder = 4 Reels per week total - Ongoing, long-term engagement - Consistent weekly cadence (we'll set fixed delivery days) About Us & Content Vision We're building Workflows - and we're documenting the journey publicly. On LinkedIn we post technical, in-the-weeds content. But on Instagram, we want something completely different. The vision for our Reels is a mix of three worlds: 1. Luxury lifestyle - the aspirational visuals, the aesthetic, the energy 2. Travel - cinematic shots from cities, hotels, scenes around the world 3. Business building - the real, raw founder journey behind it all Inspirations (study these accounts): - Daniel Dalen - Iman Gadzhi - Maurits - Plus the 5 reference Reels below

candidates.title: Shopify banner design
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I’m looking for an experienced graphic designer who can create premium, luxury-style website banners for my Shopify apparel brand. What I need: * Homepage hero banner designs for both: * Desktop * Mobile * High-end luxury/streetwear aesthetic * Clean, premium, modern design * Strong understanding of fashion and ecommerce branding * Ability to maintain consistent brand identity across all creative assets Bonus Skills (Highly Desired): * AI image generation and editing * Ability to create realistic AI fashion models wearing our products * Expand our range of model imagery while maintaining a consistent look and feel * Preserve our exact logo, garment details, embroidery, prints, colours and branding * Create images that look authentic and commercially usable, not obviously AI-generated Requirements: * Previous experience designing for Shopify brands * Strong portfolio

replacement_note: GEN-FREE replacement for a removed generative-expand task. NO image_generative_expand, NO generative fill/outpaint, NO upscale. O8 stock-hero = license a correctly-sized stock image + crop/reframe + place logo (NOT expand a small image).
